ai_summary: Creative Newtech Limited proposes to acquire 100% of Infinova (India) Private Limited for a budget of up to USD 4.00 Million. This strategic acquisition marks a pivot from a distribution-led model to an integrated, technology-led surveillance business, providing local manufacturing, exclusive brand rights, and a "Make in India" platform in the electronic security sector. While the final acquisition cost and full financial details of the target are subject to satisfactory due diligence and definitive agreements, this transaction represents a significant expansion into a higher-value, product-centric business segment.
